title: UGC Affiliated Universities In India | NBA Accredited University - JUIT
content: Pro-Chancellor Chairman 1 Shri Manoj Gaur Executive Chairman Jaiprakash Associates Limited Chief Executive Officer Vice Chairman 1 Shri Manu Bhaskar Gaur Chief Executive Officer JUIT, Waknaghat Two Members of the Trust nominated by the Pro Chancellor 1 Shri Sunil Sharma – Member Vice Chairman Jaiprakash Associates Limited 2 Shri Sunny Gaur – Member Managing Director Jaiprakash Associates Limited Two Representative of the collaborating Universities 1 Prof Rajeev Ahuja – Member Director IIT Ropar, Punjab 2 Shri Kanishk Sharma – Member Suresh Gyan Vihar University Jaipur, Rajasthan Three Distinguished Academicians/Professionals nominated by the Chancellor in consultation with the Pro-Chancellor 1 Prof. S. C. Saxena – Member Pro-Chancellor JIIT, Noida 2 Padma Shri (Dr) Satish Kumar – Member Ex-Director NIT, Kurukshetra, Haryana 3 Prof. Gautam Barua – Member Ex Director, IIT Guwahati & Director IIIT Guwahati, Assam Two Experts Representing Other Disciplines such as Finance, Law and Management nominated by the Pro-Chancellor 1 Shri Harish K Vaid – Member Advisor, JAL Sector-128, Noida (UP) 2 Shri Pankaj Gaur – Member Managing Director Jaiprakash Associates Limited Vice Chancellor of the University 1 Prof. (Dr.) Rajendra Kumar Sharma – Member One Head of Another Institute/Laboratory of the Trust 1 Prof. B. R. Mehta – Member Vice Chancellor JIIT, Noida (UP) Two Deans of the University by Rotation 1 Prof. (Dr.) Ashok Kumar Gupta, Dean (Academics & Research) – Member 2 Vacant Three Secretaries of Government of Himachal Pradesh 1 Secretary (IT), Govt. of HP – Member 2 Secretary (Education), Govt. of HP – Member 3 Secretary (Technical Education), Govt. of HP – Member Three Representatives of the Industry Nominated by the Pro-Chancellor 1 Shri Alok Gaur – Member Joint Managing Director KFCL, Kanpur, UP 2 Shri D S Ahuja – Member Director, KFCL, Kanpur, UP 3 Dr Dinesh Kumar Likhi – Member Independent Director JPVL, New Delhi Non Member Secretary 1 Brigadier RK Sharma, SM (Retd.) Registrar Minutes of the Governing Council Meeting : 14 Dec 2024 Minutes of the Governing Council Meeting : 20 April 2019
